title: Privacy advocates want Google to stop handing consumer data over to ICE
summary: The Electronic Frontier Foundation is urging California and New York attorneys general to investigate Google for failing to notify users before sharing their data with law enforcement agencies like ICE, violating its stated privacy commitments. The EFF cites the case of a former Cornell PhD candidate whose university email was accessed by ICE without notification.
content:
The Electronic Frontier Foundation (EFF) is asking the attorneys general of California and New York to investigate Google for deceptive trade practices, saying the tech giant fails to notify users before handing over their data to law enforcement agencies like ICE.
"For nearly a decade, Google has promised billions of users that it will notify them before disclosing their personal data to law enforcement," the letter says. But it didn't in the case of Amandla Thomas-Johnson, a former PhD candidate at Cornell University who says he received no notice that ICE had accessed his university email.
The EFF alleges that this isn't an isolated inc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 隐私倡导者希望谷歌停止向ICE移交消费者数据
zh.summary: 电子前沿基金会敦促加州和纽约检察长调查谷歌，因其未能在与ICE等执法机构分享用户数据前进行通知，违反了其声称的隐私承诺。电子前沿基金会列举了一名前康奈尔大学博士候选人的案例，其大学邮箱被ICE访问且未获通知。

title: Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos
summary: Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark revealed that the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos while maintaining active engagement with the U.S. government, despite ongoing litigation against federal agencies. The briefing underscores the company's complex relationship with government regulators.
content: In an interview at the Semafor World Economy summit this week, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark explained why the company was still engaged with the U.S. government while simultaneously suing them.

zh.title: Anthropic联合创始人证实公司向特朗普政府介绍了Mythos
zh.summary: Anthropic联合创始人杰克·克拉克透露，该公司向特朗普政府介绍了Mythos，同时与美国政府保持积极互动，尽管正在与联邦机构进行诉讼。这次简报凸显了该公司与政府监管机构复杂的关系。

title: The attacks on Sam Altman are a warning for the AI world
summary: Recent violent incidents targeting AI leaders, including an alleged Molotov cocktail attack on OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home and armed protests against data center development, reflect growing extremist opposition to AI advancement. The attacks underscore rising tensions between AI industry expansion and vocal resistance movements.
content:
Before allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home, the 20-year-old accused attacker wrote about his fear that the AI race would cause humans to go extinct, The San Francisco Chronicle found. Two days later, Altman's home appeared to be targeted a second time, according to The San Francisco Standard. Only a week earlier, an Indianapolis councilman reported 13 shots fired at his door, with a note that read, "No Data Centers," after he'd supported a rezoning petition for a data center developer.
These unsettling incidents have set off alarms in and around the AI industry. There's long been a vocal resistance to the t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 对山姆·奥特曼的攻击是人工智能世界的警告
zh.summary: 最近针对人工智能领导者的暴力事件，包括据称对OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼家的莫洛托夫鸡尾酒攻击和针对数据中心开发的武装抗议，反映了对人工智能进步日益增长的极端主义反对。这些攻击凸显了人工智能产业扩张与有声反抗运动之间日益升级的紧张局势。

title: London gets closer to its first robotaxi service as Waymo begins testing
summary: Waymo is beginning testing for its commercial robotaxi service in London, with plans to launch the service pending approval from the U.K. government. The move marks progress toward autonomous taxi adoption in a major international market.
content: Waymo's commercial service will eventually follow testing if the U.K. government approves.

zh.title: 伦敦距离首个机器人出租车服务更近了，Waymo 开始测试
zh.summary: Waymo 正在伦敦开始其商业机器人出租车服务的测试，计划在获得英国政府批准后推出该服务。这一举措标志着在主要国际市场中自动驾驶出租车采用的进展。

title: Elon Musk grilled by senator over X Money plans
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren is pressing Elon Musk on the safety and financial implications of his planned X Money payments platform, citing concerns about consumer protection and systemic financial risks based on X's operational track record. Musk has announced an early public access launch in April.
content:
Elon Musk is facing questions about his upcoming payments platform, X Money, and whether it will allow users to safely perform transactions. In a letter to Musk on Tuesday, Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) writes that X Money could pose a risk to "consumers, our national security, and the stability of the financial system," citing Musk's "track record operating X."
Musk said X Money will launch in early public access in April. Though Musk hasn't shared much about the platform, former X CEO Linda Yaccarino said last year that it will allow users to fund their X Wallet using Visa's Direct service, connect to debit cards for peer-to-peer transacti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克因 X Money 计划受到参议员质询
zh.summary: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦正在就其计划的 X Money 支付平台的安全性和财务影响向埃隆·马斯克施压，引用了对消费者保护和基于 X 运营记录的系统财务风险的担忧。马斯克已宣布在 4 月推出早期公众访问。

title: You can grab LG’s B5 OLED TV for over 50 percent off right now
summary: LG's 48-inch B5 OLED TV is available at Best Buy for $599.99 (50% off), offering affordable OLED picture quality with features like deep blacks, accurate colors, and 120Hz refresh rate. The 55-inch model is similarly discounted to $799.99 at multiple retailers.
content:
LG’s B5 OLED TV isn’t as bright as higher-end models, but it still looks great. | Image: LG	

​​If you’re looking to get OLED picture quality without spending a couple thousand dollars, LG’s 48-inch B5 OLED TV is on sale for $599.99 ($700 off) at Best Buy, which is one of the best prices we’ve seen on the budget-friendly TV. You can also buy the 55-inch model from Amazon, Best Buy, and LG for $799.99 ($700 off), matching its all-time low price.
LG B5 OLED TV

Where to Buy:

 $1299.99 $599.99 at Best Buy (48-inch)
 $1499.99 $799.99 at Amazon (55-inch)
 $1499.99 $799.99 at Best Buy (55-inch)

Our AV reviewer John Higgins was impressed with LG’s B5 OLED. It’s not as bright as higher-end models he’s tested, but the 4K TV still delivers a great-looking picture with accurate, realistic colors. You’re also getting all the features that characterize OLED TVs, like deep black levels, rich contrast, and excellent viewing angles. It doesn’t offer the higher refresh rate found on pricier LG models, but its 120Hz panel still keeps fast-moving scenes looking smooth and clear, whether you’re watching sports or gaming.
Beyond picture quality, the B5 has a lot of other things going for it too. You get four HDMI 2.1 ports for connecting the latest gaming consoles, along with support for both Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos. LG’s webOS platform also grants access to a wide range of streaming apps like Netflix, Hulu, Disney Plus, and more, while support for Amazon Alexa lets you control the TV with your voice. It also supports Apple AirPlay 2 and Google Cast, so you can easily stream from your phone or other devices.

zh.title: 现在可以以超过 50% 的折扣购买 LG B5 OLED 电视
zh.summary: LG 的 48 英寸 B5 OLED 电视在 Best Buy 以 $599.99（折扣 50%）的价格提供，提供经济实惠的 OLED 画质，具有深黑色、准确色彩和 120Hz 刷新率等特点。55 英寸型号在多个零售商处也以 $799.99 的价格折扣出售。

title: Leaked images reveal a dual-lens pro version of DJI’s next Osmo Pocket camera
summary: Leaked images suggest DJI is developing a pro version of the Osmo Pocket 4 with dual cameras offering ultrawide and telephoto lenses with optical zoom capabilities. The company is expected to announce the standard Osmo Pocket 4 on April 16th, though the pro variant's release timeline remains uncertain.
content:
A leaked image potentially shows an alternate version of the DJI Osmo Pocket 4 with dual cameras. | Image: Igor Bogdanov / X	

Reliable leaker Igor Bogdanov shared an image on X yesterday of an unseen person holding two versions of a handheld stabilized camera, including one that's rumored to be a pro version of the DJI Osmo Pocket 4. The company is expected to announce the latest version of its baby steadicam on April 16th following months of leaks, but it's not known if the pro version will debut at the same time.
Full specs for the Osmo Pocket 4 Pro aren't known yet, but the camera is rumored to pair an ultrawide lens with a telephoto lens offering optical zoom capabilities, according to New Camera. It could be announced alongside the standard version of the Osm …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露图像显示DJI即将推出的Osmo Pocket相机的双镜头专业版本
zh.summary: 泄露的图像表明DJI正在开发Osmo Pocket 4的专业版本,配备双摄像头,提供超广角和远摄镜头,具有光学变焦功能。该公司预计将在4月16日发布标准Osmo Pocket 4,但专业版的发布时间仍不确定。

title: YouTube livestreams will now hold back ads during peak engagement to protect the vibe
summary: YouTube is adjusting its advertising strategy for livestreams by holding back ads during peak engagement moments to preserve viewer experience. The change offers an alternative to the current YouTube Premium subscription model for ad avoidance.
content: Until now, the only way to avoid seeing ads was by paying for a YouTube Premium subscription.

zh.title: YouTube直播现在将在高峰参与时刻暂停投放广告以保护观看体验
zh.summary: YouTube正在调整其直播广告策略,在高峰参与时刻暂停投放广告以保护观看体验。这一变化为避免广告提供了当前YouTube Premium订阅模式的替代方案。

title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain
summary: Max Hodak's Science Corp. is preparing to implant its first brain sensor in a human patient to potentially treat neurological conditions through electrical stimulation of damaged brain and spinal cord cells. The device represents an early step toward therapeutic neural interfaces.
content: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to encourage healing.

zh.title: Max Hodak的Science Corp.正准备在人类大脑中植入首个传感器
zh.summary: Max Hodak的Science Corp.正准备在人类患者大脑中植入首个传感器,以通过对受损脑脊髓细胞的电刺激来治疗神经系统疾病。该设备代表了治疗性神经界面的早期步骤。

title: Google’s Spotlight-like desktop search bar for Windows is available for everyone
summary: Google's desktop search app for Windows, which functions similarly to macOS's Spotlight feature, is now globally available and allows users to search the web, local files, and Google Drive via the Alt + Space shortcut. The app supports Windows 10 and newer versions.
content:
Last year, Google announced that it was testing a Google desktop app for Windows that resembles macOS's Spotlight feature, and now the app is available globally in English. You can download the app from Google's website, and it works with PCs with Windows 10 or newer.
By pressing the Alt + Space shortcut, you can bring up the app, which lets you search both the web and files on your computer and on Google Drive. While searching, you can click through different views like All, Images, and AI Mode. If you want to ask Google questions about what you're looking at on your computer, you can use Google Lens or share your screen.
It's unclear if  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google为Windows推出类似Spotlight的桌面搜索栏现已面向所有用户提供
zh.summary: Google为Windows推出的桌面搜索应用功能类似于macOS的Spotlight，现已在全球范围内上线，用户可通过Alt + Space快捷键搜索网页、本地文件和Google Drive。该应用支持Windows 10及更新版本。

title: Google introduces "Skills" in Chrome to make Gemini prompts instantly reusable
summary: Google is introducing "Skills" in Chrome, enabling users to save custom Gemini prompts or access premade workflows from Google's library for instant reuse across multiple webpages. The feature streamlines repetitive AI tasks in the browser.
content: You can save custom prompts you find useful or grab a premade Skill from Google's library.

zh.title: Google在Chrome中推出"技能"功能使Gemini提示词可立即重用
zh.summary: Google在Chrome中推出"技能"功能，用户可保存自定义Gemini提示词或从Google库中访问预制工作流程，以便在多个网页上立即重用。该功能简化了浏览器中重复的AI任务。

title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
summary: Google is rolling out "Skills" functionality in Chrome that allows users to save and reuse AI prompts across websites, building on Gemini's existing browser integration. The feature enhances workflow efficiency by eliminating the need to re-enter prompts.
content: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.

zh.title: Google在Chrome中添加AI技能功能帮助您保存收藏的工作流程
zh.summary: Google在Chrome中推出"技能"功能，允许用户在网站间保存和重用AI提示词，扩展Gemini现有的浏览器集成。该功能通过消除重新输入提示词的需要来提高工作流程效率。

title: Chrome now lets you turn AI prompts into repeatable ‘Skills’
summary: Google is launching a Skills feature in Chrome that lets users save Gemini prompts and run them across multiple webpages with a single click, eliminating the need to repeatedly enter the same commands. The feature is designed to streamline repetitive AI-assisted tasks like recipe modifications.
content:
Google is launching a new Chrome workflow feature that allows you to reuse your favorite Gemini commands across multiple webpages. Any AI prompts can now be saved as "Skills" in the Chrome desktop browser, letting you instantly run them across any tabs you select.
"Until now, repeating an AI task - like asking for ingredient substitutions to make a recipe vegan - meant re-entering the same prompt as you visited different pages," Chrome product manager Hafsah Ismail said in the announcement. "To make this easier, we're launching Skills in Chrome, which lets you save and reuse your most helpful AI prompts and run them with a single click."
S …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Chrome 现在允许您将 AI 提示转换为可重复的"技能"
zh.summary: 谷歌在 Chrome 中推出了一项"技能"功能，允许用户保存 Gemini 提示并在单次点击中在多个网页上运行它们，无需重复输入相同的命令。该功能旨在简化重复的 AI 辅助任务，如食谱修改。

title: Physicists think they've resolved the proton size puzzle
summary: Physicists believe they have resolved the long-standing "proton radius puzzle," a measurement discrepancy that has puzzled the scientific community for years. The resolution represents a significant breakthrough in fundamental physics understanding.
content: "We believe this is the final nail in the coffin of the proton radius puzzle."

zh.title: 物理学家认为他们已经解决了质子大小之谜
zh.summary: 物理学家相信他们已经解决了长期存在的"质子半径谜题"，这是一个多年来一直困扰科学界的测量差异。这个解决方案代表了基础物理学理解的重大突破。

title: How the rewards app Freecash scammed its way to the top of the app stores
summary: Freecash, a rewards application, employed deceptive practices to climb app store rankings before being removed from Apple's App Store following a TechCrunch investigation. The case highlights vulnerabilities in app store vetting processes.
content: Freecash was removed from Apple's App Store after TechCrunch reached out for comment.

zh.title: 奖励应用 Freecash 如何通过欺诈手段登顶应用商店
zh.summary: 奖励应用 Freecash 在被从苹果应用商店移除前，采用欺骗性做法来提升应用商店排名。这个案例凸显了应用商店审核流程中的漏洞。

title: Lucid Motors names new CEO, lands more money from Uber and Saudis
summary: Lucid Motors has finally appointed a new CEO after a year-long search following Peter Rawlinson's unexpected departure. The company has also secured additional funding from Uber and Saudi investors. These developments signal efforts to stabilize the EV startup's leadership and financial position.
content: The search for a new CEO, which lasted over a year following the sudden resignation of Peter Rawlinson, is finally over.

zh.title: 路西德汽车任命新CEO，获得来自优步和沙特投资者的更多资金
zh.summary: 路西德汽车在彼得·罗林森意外离职后经过一年的搜寻，最终任命了新首席执行官。该公司还从优步和沙特投资者那里获得了额外融资。这些发展表明该电动汽车初创公司在努力稳定其领导力和财务状况。

title: A sleek, wearable airbag for cyclists is nearly here
summary: Van Rysel has developed a lightweight wearable airbag integrated directly into a race-ready skinsuit that deploys in milliseconds upon crash detection. The system is currently in final validation with professional cyclists and is expected to reach consumers within two years. The UCI-backed innovation aims to enhance safety for cyclists traveling at increasingly high speeds.
content:
The lightweight Airbag deploys in just milliseconds after detecting a crash. | Image: Van Rysel	

What you're looking at is a new airbag system integrated directly into a "race-ready" skinsuit, not bolted on like other solutions. It was developed for road cyclists by Van Rysel, with the help of airbag technology specialist In&motion. It's currently being tested on pro riders ahead of a general consumer release sometime "within the next two years."
Its development comes after the UCI, pro cycling's governing body, put out a call in February seeking gear that could help protect riders traveling faster than ever.
The current version is in final validation ahead of potential race deployment. It has a total weight of about 700 grams (500 gr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 轻巧的可穿戴式自行车安全气囊即将面世
zh.summary: Van Rysel开发了一种轻量级可穿戴安全气囊，集成在比赛级连体衣中，能在碰撞检测时毫秒级展开。该系统目前正在与职业自行车运动员进行最终验证，预计在两年内推向消费者。这项获得国际自行车联盟支持的创新旨在为以越来越高速度行驶的自行车运动员提高安全性。

title: Inertia moves to commercialize one of the world’s most elaborate science experiments
summary: Inertia has signed three agreements with the Lawrence Livermore National Lab to commercialize its pioneering fusion reactor technology. This marks a major milestone in bringing experimental fusion energy closer to practical commercialization. The partnership validates Inertia's approach to one of science's most complex challenges.
content: Inertia has signed three agreements with the Lawrence Livermore National Lab, paving the way for the company to bring its pioneering fusion reactor to market.

zh.title: 惯性公司推进将世界最复杂的科学实验之一商业化
zh.summary: 惯性公司与劳伦斯利弗莫尔国家实验室签署了三份协议，以实现其开创性核聚变反应堆技术的商业化。这标志着将实验性核聚变能源更接近实际商业化的重大里程碑。该合作关系验证了惯性公司对科学最复杂挑战之一的方法。

title: The new Trump Phone design is here
summary: Trump Mobile has unveiled a redesigned version of its T1 Phone featuring updated branding and design language while retaining the signature gold finish and American flag imagery. The company has refreshed its website and logo alongside the new device design. No official release date has been announced yet.
content:
Still proud, still American, still gold. | Image: Trump Mobile	

Trump Mobile has overhauled its website, introducing a new logo, new design language, and a new version of the T1 Phone. The redesigned phone is the same one that two company executives showed me over a video call two months ago, seemingly now confirmed to be the final design - but there's still no word on when it will arrive.
The phone is still gold, of course, with an American flag design on the rear that's black in some images, but white in others, alongside a "Trump Mobile" wordmark. I was shown a similar design but with an enormous "T1" logo across the whole of the rear, but I was told that would be removed, and it's nowhere to be seen …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普手机的新设计发布了
zh.summary: 特朗普移动公司发布了重新设计的T1手机，采用了更新的品牌和设计语言，同时保留了标志性的金色饰面和美国国旗图案。该公司同时更新了其网站和徽标。目前尚未公布官方发布日期。

title: An Amazon warehouse worker died on the job at Oregon facility
summary: A worker at an Amazon warehouse in Oregon died on the job, though Amazon claims the death was not work-related. The incident highlights ongoing safety concerns at Amazon's facilities.
content: Though Amazon has faced issues with warehouse safety, the company said that the death was not work related.

zh.title: 亚马逊俄勒冈州仓库员工在工作中身亡
zh.summary: 俄勒冈州亚马逊仓库的一名员工在工作中身亡，尽管亚马逊声称该死亡与工作无关。该事件凸显了亚马逊设施持续存在的安全问题。

title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
summary: OpenAI has acquired personal finance startup Hiro, signaling the company is developing financial planning capabilities for ChatGPT.
content: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.

zh.title: OpenAI收购了人工智能个人财务初创公司Hiro
zh.summary: OpenAI已收购个人财务初创公司Hiro，表明该公司正在为ChatGPT开发财务规划功能。

title: Daniel Moreno-Gama is facing federal charges for attacking Sam Altman’s home and OpenAI’s HQ
summary: Daniel Moreno-Gama faces federal charges after allegedly traveling from Texas to California and throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's home and attempting to breach OpenAI's headquarters. He has been charged with attempted destruction of property with explosives and possession of an unregistered firearm.
content:
Daniel Moreno-Gama is now facing federal charges after allegedly traveling from Texas to California with the intent to kill OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. On April 10th, he was arrested after throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home and attempting to break into OpenAI's headquarters. According to prosecutors, at the HQ, "Moreno-Gama attempted to break the glass doors of the building with a chair and stated that he had come to burn down the location and kill anyone inside."
His charges include "attempted damage and destruction of property by means of explosives and possession of an unregistered firearm," according to the Departmen …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Daniel Moreno-Gama因攻击Sam Altman住宅和OpenAI总部而面临联邦指控
zh.summary: Daniel Moreno-Gama据称从德克萨斯州前往加州并向Sam Altman住宅投掷莫洛托夫鸡尾酒，试图突破OpenAI总部，现面临联邦指控。他被控试图用爆炸物摧毁财产和拥有未经注册的枪支。
